title: Ka Thei Hi, Kei Hong Tanpa Hing Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka thei hi, kei hong Tanpa hing hi
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi
Ka thei hi, nuntakna
hong pia
Hehpihna vang a khut sung om

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka thei ka thei To Zeisuh hing
hi
Leitung ah hong paikik ding hi
Ka thei ka thei nuntakna hongpia
Hehpihna vaang a khut sung
om

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka thei hi, hong thuciam peel ngei kei
A gensa thu bei ngeilo ding
A gilo
sihna pan ka suakta
Amah muding nungciang in ah

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka thei hi, ka om nang mun
bawlkhol
A omna peuh kei zong om ning
Alamdang Amah’n kei hong kem hi
Kei a dingin
hongpai kik ding
